title: Neural stretching and Distalo -proximal release for chronic neck pain
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"65q5a","text":"This is a randomized controlled trial that evaluates the Effectiveness of neural stretching and distalo -proximal   release for chronic neck pain with referred symptoms. Participants are assigned to two groups: the experimental group will receive neural stretching and distalo -proximal release, and the control group will receive conventional physiotherapy. Both groups will undergo 6 weeks of intervention, and each session treatment time will be 40 minutes. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"5p9dk","text":"Avoid intervention in cases of:\n","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9jjph","text":"Acute cervical injury or instability","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eca7l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d6qp7","text":"Active infection or inflammation","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b5kn3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"tl5m","text":"Malignancy in the treatment area","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fd8k0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eke00","text":"Ensure equipment (goniometer, TENS machine) is calibrated and checked before each use.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2h07u","text":"Maintain session records for all participants.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
